decision: Keep native Dataplex lineage and aspect mutation as an explicit adapter command surface. Do not emit native Dataplex lineage/aspect mutations automatically during every contract smoke or apply run.
included_surface: deterministic Dataplex Data Lineage publication/readback planning artifacts
BigQuery control-table OpenLineage evidence during normal smoke/apply execution
excluded_surface: automatic native Dataplex Data Lineage publication during every contract run
automatic Dataplex aspect mutation during every contract run
implicit Dataplex AspectType creation/update as a side effect of unrelated write/load commands
rationale: Native Dataplex lineage/aspect execution mutates platform metadata and therefore needs explicit operator intent, IAM and quota ownership.
Keeping native publication explicit preserves deterministic contract execution, bounded retries and idempotency expectations for ordinary smoke/apply paths.
The validated neutral OpenLineage control-table evidence remains the automatic, low-risk lineage evidence surface for normal executions.
The explicit command can still be scheduled or orchestrated by a platform team when native Dataplex publication is required.
